args.message: I understand you're looking for every single detail, and I appreciate your thoroughness. While I can't pull up exact dates and mileage for *every* single oil change from that binder right this second – sometimes those older slips are hard to decipher perfectly – what I can tell you is that the overall pattern shows consistent, regular maintenance, well within Toyota's recommendations. Our multi-point inspection covers all critical areas: engine diagnostics, transmission function, brake system, suspension components, tire condition, and all electronic systems. No advisories or minor issues were noted on this particular vehicle; it passed with flying colors, indicating excellent condition. We stand by our inspections and the previous owner's diligent care of this SUV.
